releases.description:
• Modernized Credits & About: Completely redesigned the Credits screen with expressive styling, TopAppBar scroll behavior, and unified developer profile visuals matching the About screen.
• Advanced Playlist Management: Redesigned Playlist and Import screens with Material 3 Expressive UI. Enhanced headers, sort menus, and added support for renaming local playlists.
• Universal Playlist Import: Implemented direct native import for YouTube Music sources and added support for .m3u playlist files.
• Hardware Integration: Added MediaButtonReceiver for superior hardware media key handling and peripheral control.
• Database Integrity: Migrated database to version 9 to resolve critical Room data integrity and migration crashes.
• Playback Stability: Resolved auto-skip chains caused by resolution parse errors. Optimized playback latency and fixed resolution race conditions during rapid track skipping.
• UI Polish: Stabilized player layout with fixed-height seekbar containers to eliminate loading jank. Expanded brand-standard Squircle shapes to all remaining UI components.
• Fixes & Refinements: Resolved duplicate and uneditable imported playlists, fixed 'Date Added' library sorting, and corrected edge-case Radio queue logic bugs.

• Core Playback Overhaul: Massive performance update reducing playback startup latency to 500ms for near-instant response. Optimized main-thread resource usage by decoupling position updates and offloading JSON serialization to background threads.
• Skip & Resolution Stability: Resolved critical issues with orphaned coroutines and auto-skip chains during rapid track skipping. Fixed double-resolution race conditions between service and client.
• Material 3 Expressive UI Polish: Massive refinement phase introducing the new Wavy Seekbar style, YouTube-style bouncy animations for Like/Dislike buttons, and a completely redesigned Credits & Song Info screen with adaptive artwork coloring.
• Android Auto Overhaul: Comprehensive fix for car-screen integration. Resolved issues with skip buttons, auto-advance, empty menus, and playlist transition hangs.
• Advanced Playlist Management: Full suite of management tools including track sorting (A-Z, Artist, Date), mass reordering, and multi-select deletion. Added a smart 24-hour auto-clear policy for temporary playlist cache.
• Local Library & Offline: Major enhancement for offline listeners with folder browsing support and integrated local albums/artists in search.
• Audio Refinements: Resolved volume micro-toggle clicks and improved TTS ducking/restoration logic for smoother transitions.
• Modern Infrastructure: Full migration to Navigation 2.9.0 and Coil 3. Updated SDK to 36 and improved JNI-based recommendation scoring.

• Material 3 Expressive Redesign: Massive UI overhaul with unified expressive components and squircle shapes.
• Visual Consistency: Switched all artwork, thumbnails, and action buttons to modern Squircle shapes.
• Redesigned Core Screens: Completely refreshed Settings, Album, Playlist, Artist, and Search screens.
• Robust Backup Restore: Fixed crashes after Swift Backup restoration by handling corrupted encryption keys.
• Seamless History Sync: Automatically enables 'Sync with YouTube History' for logged-in users.
• TV Optimization: Integrated dpadFocusable across all major interactive elements for better remote navigation.

• YouTube Music Style Mini Player: Refined the YT Music mini player with a top-aligned progress bar and classic control layout.
• Mini Player Refinement: Removed artist name click action to prevent accidental navigation while controlling playback.
• Recommendations: Significantly improved the recommendation engine for better track discovery.
• Enhanced Media Controls: Improved notification sync for shuffle and repeat states with better visual feedback.
• Stability: Fixed mini player swipe-down dismissal logic and optimized transitions.

• Modernized Update Mechanism: Migrated to a standalone :updater module with structured JSON changelog support and a dedicated rich-UI Updater screen.
• Stability fixes
• Minor UI refinements
• Code optimization

• Spotify Pro Import: Enhanced Spotify integration supporting albums, artists, and individual tracks with real-time fetching progress and mobile share link support.
• YouTube Playlist Pagination: Resolved continuation token issues and pagination limits for large playlists, ensuring all songs are loaded correctly.
• F-Droid Readiness: Added Fastlane metadata and anti-feature disclosures for F-Droid submission.
• Next-Gen Personalization: High-performance Recommendation Engine with JNI-based native scoring, genre affinity vectors, and deep YouTube Music integration.
• Persistent Logging & Diagnostics: Integrated a robust file-based logging system that captures startup events and provides a 'Share App Logs' feature for easier troubleshooting.
• Performance Optimization: Implemented explicit keys in all major LazyColumn and LazyGrid lists, significantly reducing UI re-composition and ensuring buttery-smooth scrolling.
• App Health & Crash Reporting: Fully optimized ACRA integration for Android 16, capturing more detailed system context (RAM, Display, Build ID) in every bug report.
• Cinematic Player Transitions: Completely refactored Video Mode using AnimatedContent for seamless cross-fading between artwork and video without UI layout shifts.
• Infinite Play (Radio Mode): New toggle in the Queue screen that automatically extends your session with similar songs when the queue nears the end.
• Interactive Queue: Added full context (3-dot) menus to every item in the queue, including 'Now Playing', allowing for deep song management without leaving the list.
• Adaptive Recommendations: 'Made for You' banners are now closeable with a 7-day persistence logic, automatically switching to a 'Daily Mix' style when dismissed.
• Infinite Home Feed: Optimized auto-loading logic that proactively fetches diverse recommendation strategies (Artist Deep-dives, Nostalgia, Blended Genres) as you scroll.
• Listen Together 2.0: Massive redesign with Material 3 Expressive UI and ultra-low latency Protobuf-based binary transport for perfect real-time synchronization.
• MiniPlayer UI: Added dotted progress indicator for a more refined and modern aesthetic.
• Ringtone Engine: Fully restored 'Set as Ringtone' feature with integrated audio trimmer, progress tracking, and robust system permission handling.
• Under-the-hood Stability: Resolved JVM signature clashes in logging utilities, fixed critical coroutine import errors, and improved audio decoder resilience on newer Android versions.

• Improved Lyrics Engine
• New Player Themes
• Bug fixes and stability improvements
